proposals.pattern: mv_tier == 'large' AND (fundamental valuation fields null/stale OR quant anti_signals contain 'zoo_snapshot_stale') AND conviction_level == 'low'
proposals.proposed_rule: Auto-set position_sizing_advice to '0%' and inject hard_rule_trigger 'large_cap_data_gap'. Block any non-zero position approval unless fresh fundamental data (PE/PB) or institutional/northbound flow confirmation is provided, overriding technical bounce setups.
proposals.rationale: The report correctly defaulted to 0% position for a large-cap with missing valuation data and low quant conviction, despite a technical bounce regime. Large-cap alpha relies on fundamental anchors and institutional flows; technical signals alone are insufficient. Codifying this as a CRO hard rule prevents future misalignment where writers might chase bounces on data-deficient large-caps.
